source: docs/04-开发验证/jinjiang-douyin-existing-topic-distribution.md; deep-interview spec .omx/specs/deep-interview-top10-jinjiang-video-scope.md; only challenge/tag names containing 锦江
notes: Caption hashtag matching for this scope counts only the 10 explicit #锦江... hashtags listed here.
酒店, 住宿, 高性价比酒店推荐 are excluded because they do not contain 锦江 and are generic/weakly related for this pass.

Current live use is metadata-only unbounded/as-complete-as-API-allows: challenge_index,video_metadata; no comments/replies/profiles; stop with checkpoint/partial report on quota/rate/pagination/API blockers.
